pi_items.metadata_value: NCBI GenBank: D13S317 microsatellite (MH167239, 206bp), vWA/VWF gene (M25858.1, 5285bp), TH01/tyrosine hydroxylase (D00269, 2838bp) - real CODIS STR locus sequences
pi_items.verified_value: NCBI GenBank: D13S317 microsatellite (MH167239, 206bp), vWA/VWF gene (M25858.1, 5285bp), TH01/tyrosine hydroxylase (D00269, 2838bp) - real CODIS STR locus sequences. Evidence sample alleles are synthetically generated.
pi_items.source: Task files and setup scripts checking (assets header lines confirming accession and sequence lengths, and setup_task.sh generating evidence_sample_alleles.fasta).
setup_task.sh copying references for D13S317, vWA, and TH01
export_result.sh checks for these specific file names to verify task completion.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for ugene_env forensic_str_profiling task by verifying the presence and properties of real CODIS STR locus sequences from NCBI GenBank (D13S317: MH167239 at 206bp, vWA: M25858.1 at 5285bp, TH01: D00269 at 2838bp). It was also confirmed that the evidence sample alleles file is synthetically generated via the setup script. The expected output file paths strictly match the required annotations and final report instructions.
